description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the chest embellished with red, black and gingham bows FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Slip into childhood memories with this bratty white tee from the doodle collection of jealous 21. The doodle graphic on the front of the little angel with the speared tail reminds us that even the nicest girls have a hint of the devil in them. Team this with faded denim mini skirts, shorts or jeans and stylish footwear now available at myntra, for hanging out with friendsModel statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
